title: fix: move packages to @pollinations scope
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Renames published packages and workspace imports from `@pollinations_ai/*` to `@pollinations/*`.
- Keeps package publishing on npmjs.org only and removes the legacy GitHub Packages rewrite path.
- Uses the verified GitHub Actions `NPM_TOKEN` secret for npmjs.org publishes under the `@pollinations` npm org.
- Updates docs, app catalog links, lockfiles, and local consumers for SDK, UI, MCP, and CLI package names.
- Cleans the publish workflow so package detection covers the full push range and CLI version checks read the package name from `package.json`.

Validation:
- `rg` check for stale `@pollinations_ai/*` package imports in `apps/react`, `enter.pollinations.ai`, `packages/ui`, `packages/sdk`, and lockfiles
- `npm ls @pollinations/ui @pollinations/sdk --workspaces --depth=0`
- `npm run typecheck --prefix apps/react`
- `npm run build --prefix apps/react`
- `npm run typecheck --prefix enter.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run build:frontend --prefix enter.pollinations.ai`
- `npm test --workspace @pollinations/icons`
- `npm run build --prefix packages/polli-cli`
- `env PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH" npx --yes npm@10.8.2 publish --dry-run --access public` from `packages/polli-cli`
- `git diff --check`
- YAML parse check for `.github/workflows/publish-packages.yml`

Notes:
- `@pollinations/sdk`, `@pollinations/ui`, and `@pollinations/mcp` are not currently published on npm; this workflow will publish them after merge when package paths change.
- `@pollinations/cli` already exists at `0.1.0-alpha.0`; this repo version is `0.1.5`.
- `@pollinations_ai/ui@0.0.1` is already live on npm and still needs a manual npm unpublish/deprecate decision.

gist.headline: Moving day on npm
gist.blurb: We packed up our boxes and moved to a cleaner neighborhood on npm. All our SDKs and tools now live under the official @pollinations scope.
gist.summary: All pollinations packages, including the SDK, UI components, MCP server, and CLI, have been migrated from the legacy @pollinations_ai scope to @pollinations on npmjs.org.
gist.impact: Developers using the CLI or early SDKs will need to update their package.json dependencies and import paths to use the new @pollinations prefix.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot organizing neatly labeled cardboard boxes (representing npm packages) onto a fresh shelf, symbolizing the move to a new namespace.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny red baseball cap, organizing small cardboard boxes with code symbols onto a bright lime green (#ecf874) shelf. A chunky retro robot with a monitor head helps carry a box, its screen glowing with a happy face. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
